prices.source_phrase: Active duty military and veterans, and their families (up to 6 people) receive complimentary general daytime admission, with an additional 25% off for others in the party.
prices.source_block:
Military Discounts
Old Sturbridge Village is proud to be a Blue Star Museum , and our participation is made possible by the generous donors of the Field of Flags campaign.
Active duty military and veterans, and their families (up to 6 people) receive complimentary general daytime admission, with an additional 25% off for others in the party.
Note – Military discounts available with military and photo ID at the Visitor Center only. Valid for general daytime admission only, not for special evening programs like Phantoms by Firelight or Christmas by Candlelight.

prices.source_phrase: Active members receive complimentary general daytime admission and discounts on special programs and events, as well as guest admission tickets.
prices.source_block:
Members
Active members receive complimentary general daytime admission and discounts on special programs and events, as well as guest admission tickets. Learn more about membership and the many benefits that an Old Sturbridge Village membership can offer.

reservation.source_phrase: Standard daytime admission tickets are nonrefundable but can be applied to another date than originally intended if necessary.
reservation.source_block:
When is the Village open? What are your admission rates?
You can check our current and upcoming hours, as well as our daytime admission rates, here .

What is your refund policy?
Standard daytime admission tickets are nonrefundable but can be applied to another date than originally intended if necessary. Click here for details .

hours.source_block:
Hours of Operation
Hours are subject to change; Check back to confirm before visiting!
April 1, 2026 – September 27, 2026
OPEN Wednesday – Sunday* | 9:30 am-5:00 pm
ALSO OPEN:
Monday, Monday, May 25 (Memorial Day)
Monday, Monday, September 7 (Labor Day)
*The Village will be CLOSED on Saturday, September 26, 2026 for our Revolutionary Gala
